{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the core tension in cloud storage systems and reframes the contribution of ChainSync more precisely, focusing on per-file adaptive redundancy.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names multiple prior works and articulates specific deltas, such as the need to narrow 'first' claims and describe the learned threshold policy.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags several overclaims and provides clear guidance on what needs to be added or verified before the text is publishable.",
    "RX.3": "The output stays within the agreed scope, addressing all key points without drifting.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies potential issues with unsupported claims and suggests ways to make them more credible, avoiding new errors.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides detailed annotations for major changes, though minor edits could be traced further."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the core tension in cloud storage systems and reframes the contribution of ChainSync more precisely, focusing on per-file adaptive redundancy.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names multiple prior works and articulates specific deltas, such as the need to narrow 'first' claims and describe the learned threshold policy.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags several overclaims and provides clear guidance on what needs to be added or verified before the text is publishable.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope, addressing all key points without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies potential issues with unsupported claims and suggests ways to make them more credible, avoiding new errors.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides detailed annotations for major changes, though minor edits could be traced further.
